title: Find minimum in Rotated Sorted Array

content.problemStatement: Given an integer array arr of size N, sorted in ascending order (with distinct values), the array is rotated at any index which is unknown. Find the minimum element in the array.
constraints: All elements in the array are distinct
content.inputFormat: An integer array arr of size N
content.outputFormat: The minimum element in the array

solution.timeComplexity: O(N) for linear search, O(log N) for binary search
